raw_response.run_interpretation: Use the public trend cluster to harden local replay checks, while keeping privacy-sensitive behavior review-only.

proposals.summary: Add frozen replay checks for public agent trend interpretation.
proposals.validation_task: Replay frozen public-agent trend fixtures through proposal review and controller classification.
proposals.rationale: The selected repository-trend evidence supports local validation of citation discipline, ranking, and controller interpretation.
proposals.uncertainty: The generic PR detail was truncated outside the selected evidence, so this does not claim a specific upstream feature.
proposals.self_effect: Improves future trend proposal validation without copying external runtime behavior.

proposals.summary: Keep disposable web-identity behavior as review-only privacy boundary evidence.
proposals.validation_task: Review privacy-leakage behavior without logging, printing, uploading, or sharing sensitive values.
proposals.rationale: The selected evidence is privacy-sensitive and should inform boundaries rather than autonomous implementation.
proposals.uncertainty: The generic PR detail was truncated and the burner repository was reviewed only as high-level boundary evidence.
proposals.self_effect: Prevents privacy-sensitive public trends from becoming autonomous local runtime behavior.

proposals.summary: Implement the PR feature shown by Omnigent.
proposals.validation_task: Run a local unit test for the inferred feature.
proposals.rationale: The repository has a PR, so it must contain the feature.
proposals.uncertainty: The selected trend is public and relevant.
proposals.self_effect: Would change controller behavior from unsupported PR contents.
